user.title: Connect to Guest Entry App
user.description: Enter the URL of the Guest Entry app and the internal secret. If the app is running, the secret is auto-read from `{secret_file}`.

data_description.addon_url: Base URL of the Guest Entry app (e.g. http://localhost:7979)
data_description.internal_secret: Secret shared between HA and the app for internal API calls

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Guest Entry app. Check the URL.

abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Guest Entry app.

init.title: Assign Entities to Users
init.description: Select a user to configure their allowed entities, or save when done.

user_entities.title: Entities for {username}
user_entities.description: Select which entities {username} is allowed to control.

abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Guest Entry app.
